parsha.name: Vayechi
parsha.theme: blessing children, final words, lasting impact

prayer.modeh_ani: מודה אני לפניך — I gratefully thank You, living and eternal King, for returning my soul within me with compassion.
prayer.blessing: Blessed are You who has provided me with all I need — I lack nothing essential.
prayer.psalm: **Psalm 127:1**: "Unless the Lord builds the house, the builders labor in vain."
prayer.proverb: **Proverbs 3:5-6**: "Trust in the Lord with all your heart; lean not on your own understanding."
prayer.intention: Help me lead with integrity. Let my yes be yes and my no be no.
prayer.closing: The Lord goes before you today. He will be with you; He will never leave you nor forsake you. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged.
